nasb.text: To make known to the sons of men Your mighty acts And the glory of the majesty of Your kingdom.

esv.text: to make known to the children of man your  mighty deeds, and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.

cnv.text: 好使世人知道你大能的作為， 和你國威嚴的尊榮。

ccb.text: 好让世人知道你大能的作为和你国度的威严与荣耀。

csbs.text: 为要让世人知道你的大能作为， 和你王权威严的荣耀。
